items.short_evidence: DETR baseline: set prediction, object queries, Hungarian matching, no NMS.
Deformable attention and multi-scale features target DETR convergence and scale limitations.
Conditional spatial queries improve fast training convergence.
DINO combines denoising and anchor/query improvements for stronger DETR training.
Real-time DETR work positions DETR variants against YOLO-style detectors.
